title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The system coordinates four specialized agents (Flight, Hotel, Itinerary, and Final Response) that collectively plan trips by integrating APIs for flight data and hotel search with memory persistence via PostgreSQL.
